step_rationale: Cardioprotective factor; acts on endothelial stabilization but off atherothrombotic cascade.
mechanism: Angiopoietin-1 enhances endothelial barrier function and vascular stability, reducing infarct size through cardioprotection.

references.title: Hypoxia-inducible factor 1-alpha enhances the secretome to rejuvenate adult cardiosphere-derived cells.
references.journal: The Journal of thoracic and cardiovascular surgery
